narrative:
Cuyahoga County has 865,425 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 22.0 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 28.6% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +11.5% D−R vs +26.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
